title: Felpscraft
body:
![Felpscraft Serverpack Banner](https://i.imgur.com/9jketAC.png)
# Felpscraft Serverpack
This modpack is essential for players on the Brazilian Minecraft server "Felpscraft".

## Who should use this modpack?
The modpack focuses on additions and improvements for server players, even so, it’s an excellent base modpack for general optimization, with few overall changes and a focus on using only stable and functional mods.

## IMPORTANT NOTICE

_All the contents of this modpack or the Minecraft server are not part of projects or plans from the content creator affiliated with the Discord server._
